name: acid reflux
title: best herbal teas for acid reflux
description: Trachyspermum ammi tea contains bioactive constituents such as thymol, carvacrol, and limonene, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and carminative properties that help alleviate symptoms of acid reflux. The antispasmodic and gastroprotective properties of this herbal tea also contribute to its effectiveness in treating acid reflux by soothing the digestive tract and reducing inflammation in the esophagus.
